leadText: The Pidgeotite (Japanese: ピジョットナイト Pigeotnite) is a type of held item introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire. It is the Mega Stone that allows Pidgeot to Mega Evolve into Mega Pidgeot.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Pidgeot (or is present in the player 's Bag P E ), the Pidgeotite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Pidgeot if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Pidgeotite from Pidgeot. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Pidgeot, the Pidgeotite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Pidgeot when it performs a Spectacular Talent during a Pokémon Contest Spectacular if its Trainer has a Key Stone. Pidgeot will remain a Mega Pidgeot until the Talent Round ends. Any Pokémon holding a Pidgeotite in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire cannot be traded to Pokémon X and Y .

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Pidgeot (or is present in the player 's Bag P E ), the Pidgeotite allows it to Mega Evolve into Mega Pidgeot if its Trainer has a Key Stone . A Trainer can only Mega Evolve one Pokémon per battle (or only have one Mega-Evolved Pokémon at any given moment ZA ). As a Mega Stone , it is unaffected by item-negating effects (such as Embargo and Klutz ). Item-manipulating effects (such as Trick and Fling ) cannot give or remove a Pidgeotite from Pidgeot.

sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description OR AS S M US UM Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. Have Pidgeot hold it, and this stone will enable it to Mega Evolve during battle. P E One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. This stone will enable Pidgeot to Mega Evolve during battle. ZA One of a variety of mysterious Mega Stones. A Pidgeot holding this stone will be able to Mega Evolve during battle.
